news.headline: Eric Church to headline 13th Annual Mack, Jack & McConaughey Gala on April 24 at ACL Live; Tickets on Sale Dec 6.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, it was announced that Eric Church will headline the Mack, Jack & McConaughey (MJ&M) event at ACL Live in Austin, Texas on Thursday, April 24. Tickets for the event will go on sale on December 6 at 10 A.M. CST. Eric Church, a renowned artist with seven ACM Awards, four CMA Awards, and 10 Grammy nominations, is set to deliver an unforgettable performance.

news.headline: Private tutoring market to grow by USD 25.71B (2024-2028) with a CAGR of 10.87%, driven by STEM focus and AI adoption.
news.summary: A recently published report utilizing AI technology predicts significant growth in the global private tutoring market, with an estimated increase of USD 25.71 billion between 2024 and 2028. This growth is anticipated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.87% over the forecast period.

news.headline: Controversial pardons for financial crimes involving Hunter Biden; making headlines for questionable past acts.
Trump: If Gaza hostages not released prior to his January 20 inauguration, there will be all hell to pay in the middle east.
Israeli Military: We are now attacking targets in Lebanon.
American Industrial Partners acquires PPG's U.S. and Canadian Architectural Coatings Business, renaming it The Pittsburgh Paints Company.
news.summary: In a significant development, a 125-year-old business has been rebranded as The Pittsburgh Paints Company, with a primary goal of catering to professionals and DIY enthusiasts by providing top-notch products and cutting-edge innovation. The company, based in Cranberry Township, Pennsylvania, announced this change on December 2, 2024, through a press release by American Industrial Partners ("AIP"). This strategic shift marks a new direction for the long-standing business to deliver industry-leading solutions.

news.headline: Tech stocks, led by Apple, surged as Nasdaq 100 retested all-time high at 21,180 points; Dollar rose while Bitcoin fell to $95,000.
news.summary: On Monday, Wall Street had a mixed start to the week and the last month of the year. Mega-cap tech stocks and semiconductors led gains, propelling the Nasdaq 100 to retest its all-time high of 21,180 points from November 11, 2024. Apple Inc (NASDAQ:AAPL) rose by 1%, continuing its rally to new all-time highs amid investor optimism for robust holiday-season sales. However, sectors outside of tech, communication services, and consumer discretionary showed weakness, with all others dropping. Despite this, the ISM Manufacturing PMI exceeded expectations but remained in contraction territory.

news.headline: University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus awarded up to $46 million to develop treatment for blindness, aiming to restore vision.
news.summary: Researchers at the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus have been granted a significant award of up to $46 million from ARPA-H to advance the groundbreaking technology of whole eye transplantation. This innovative approach aims to provide restored vision to individuals suffering from complete blindness. The funding, announced on December 2, 2024, will enable the research team to move closer to making this vision-restoring procedure a reality.

news.headline: EverBank opens new financial center in Roseville, Calif., offering consumer and commercial banking solutions.
news.summary: EverBank, N.A., a nationwide specialized bank, has announced the establishment of its Roseville financial center on December 2, 2024. The center aims to offer consumer and commercial banking services to an expanding customer base in the United States.

news.headline: PPG sells U.S. & Canada architectural coatings business for $550 million to American Industrial Partners. #PPG
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, PPG (NYSE: PPG) has finalized the sale of its entire architectural coatings segment in the U.S. and Canada for $550 million to American Industrial Partners. The deal includes a transaction of 100% ownership to AIP, an industrial investor firm. PPG will retain its architectural coatings divisions in Latin America, Europe, and Asia Pacific, where the company maintains dominant market positions as either #1 or #2 in various markets. This strategic move allows PPG to focus on strengthening its core businesses in other regions, while enhancing its presence globally.

news.headline: Puloli publishes industry-leading results from methane monitoring tests in the Eagle Ford basin in South.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 2, 2024, Puloli, Inc., announced insights from trials on their Paradigm M-Series conducted in the Eagle Ford basin. Puloli specializes in cost-effective methane monitoring for large-scale applications. The tests, performed earlier this year, demonstrated the effectiveness of their solution in the specified area.

news.headline: MicroStrategy continues to increase its bitcoin holdings by buying at lower prices. #BTC #investing #crypto
K. Hovnanian® Homes unveils new website www.khov.com on Nov 13, 2024.
news.summary: K. Hovnanian® Homes recently marked the debut of its enhanced website, www.khov.com, which officially went live on November 13, 2024.

news.headline: Vision RNG signs a 25-year gas agreement with Greenwood County, SC landfill for renewable use. #sustainability #renewables
news.summary: Vision RNG LLC, a company based in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania, has recently entered into a deal to procure landfill gas from the Greenwood County landfill in South Carolina. This gas will be utilized for renewable purposes, marking a significant step towards sustainable energy practices. This agreement is set to positively impact both the environment and the economy, with the exact terms and quantities of the gas acquisition currently undisclosed. The move reflects a growing trend towards eco-friendly initiatives in energy production and signifies a potential shift towards more renewable resources.

news.summary: Following the completion of the private placement referenced in company announcement no. 24.19, Bang & Olufsen A/S (referred to as B&O) has received notification of the following update:

news.headline: Stellantis NV market value halves in 2024 as stock drops 47%. CEO Tavares exits early, causing shares to fall by 7%.
news.summary: Stellantis NV (NYSE:STLA) has faced significant challenges in 2024, with its stock dropping 47% year-to-date, leading to almost half of its market value being eroded. The departure of CEO Carlos Tavares, who resigned unexpectedly over a year before his planned retirement in early 2026, has added to the uncertainty for investors. The automaker is struggling with declining electric vehicle sales, high inventories, and increased competition from China. Following Tavares' exit, Stellantis Inc. shares fell by nearly 7%. Tavares led Stellantis since January 2021 after the merger of PSA Group and Fiat Chrysler Automobiles, becoming the highest-paid executive in the automotive sector with earnings of $39 million in 2023. Despite his cost-cutting and electrification efforts, the company's EV sales lagged in 2024, leading to a 20% decline in shares post-merger. Tavares' leadership has been a mix of successes and challenges for Stellantis.

news.headline: Black Friday saw record-breaking online sales, with a 9% increase on Thanksgiving and 10% increase on Black Friday from 2023. AI shopping assistants were up 31% and sites with AI services saw a 9% increase in conversion rates. Retailers like Amazon and Wayfair are leading in e-commerce growth.
news.summary: Retailers experienced a surge in customer traffic both online and in-person over the Black Friday weekend, marking it as the busiest shopping period ever. Analysts at BofA Securities shared insights on the emerging leaders in the retail industry this holiday season. Online sales, as reported by Adobe Analytics, showed a 9% increase on Thanksgiving and a 10% increase on Black Friday compared to the previous year. Notably, the utilization of AI shopping assistants rose by 31%, leading to a 9% boost in conversion rates on platforms offering AI services. Early holiday data suggests a robust uptick in e-commerce sector performance, with major players like Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Wayfair Inc. (NYSE: W) leading the trend. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete coverage.

news.headline: Jason Laks appointed president of Broadway League, aims for bigger goals beyond 2019 in the industry.
news.summary: Jason Laks has been appointed as the new president of The Broadway League, a prominent industry trade organization in the theater world. Laks expressed his vision for the organization, emphasizing the need to surpass the achievements of 2019. This leadership change comes as the organization continues to navigate challenges within the industry. Laks is set to spearhead the organization's strategies and initiatives moving forward.

news.headline: Camping equipment market to hit $33.2B by 2031, new report reveals. Trends analyzed include backpacks, sleeping bags, tents, cooking systems.
news.summary: In Redding, California on December 2, 2024, it was reported that a recent market research study on the Camping Equipment industry revealed significant findings. The report titled, "Camping Equipment Market Size, Share, Forecast, & Trends Analysis," focused on various product types including backpacks, sleeping bags, tents, and cooking systems. The study also delved into different distribution channels such as online stores and offline outlets. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into the current market scenario and predicts future trends in the industry.

Global magnesite market to grow by USD 3.10 billion (2024-2028) with CAGR of 5.64%, driven by steel industry demand for refractories and AI driving market transformation.
news.summary: In a report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market dynamics, it has been projected that the worldwide magnesite market will experience a substantial expansion of approximately USD 3.10 billion between 2024 and 2028. Technavio's analysis suggests that the market is anticipated to exhibit a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.64% throughout the forecast period. This growth indicates a positive trend in the industry, driven by factors such as increasing demand for magnesite products.

news.headline: Matterport gains AWS Manufacturing and Industrial Competency and Energy Competency, showcasing commitment to innovation.
news.summary: Matterport's commitment to utilizing AWS technologies for innovative solutions is exemplified through their recent certifications. These certifications showcase Matterport's dedication to leveraging the power of AWS technologies to provide cutting-edge solutions.

Upsher-Smith to present at AES 2024 Annual Meeting in Los Angeles, showcasing multiple events from Dec. 6-10.
news.summary: Maple Grove, Minnesota - On December 2, 2024, Upsher-Smith Laboratories, LLC revealed its involvement in AES 2024, the Annual Meeting of the American Epilepsy Society, taking place in Los Angeles, California from December 6-10, 2024. During the event, Upsher-Smith will host various activities and presentations to engage attendees.

news.headline: Outdoor Kitchen Cabinets Market to grow by USD 1.70 Billion (2024-2028) with AI's role, online sales surge - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of AI on market evolution, particularly in the outdoor kitchen cabinets industry. According to Technavio, the global market for outdoor kitchen cabinets is projected to increase by a substantial USD 1.70 billion between 2024 and 2028. This growth translates to a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.01% during this period.

EastGroup Properties declares 180th consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $1.40 per share on Dec. 2, 2024. Payable on Jan. 15, 2025.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Jackson, Mississippi, EastGroup Properties (NYSE: EGP) disclosed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.40 per share. This dividend will be paid on January 15, 2025, to shareholders who hold Common Stock as of December [specific date not provided].

news.headline: North Shore Community Health partners with ENGIE for two-year renewable energy agreement. (Words: 100)
news.summary: Recently, North Shore Community Health Center in Salem, Mass. has finalized a renewable energy deal with ENGIE Resources LLC located in Houston. The two-year agreement is with ENGIE North America, with the aim of providing Renewable Energy to NSCH.

DWF Labs moves to Abu Dhabi to enhance its presence in the Middle East, joining its base in Dubai.
news.summary: DWF Labs has established itself as a resident within the Dubai Multi Commodities Centre in Dubai. This move is noteworthy as it joins other cryptocurrency firms that have a presence in multiple emirates.

Fed official Bostic undecided on December rate decision.
AirSculpt® Technologies, Inc. opens new White Plains center at One North Broadway, Unit 111. Industry leader in premium body contouring procedures. (Characters: 130)
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, AirSculpt® Technologies, Inc. revealed the launch of its new body contouring center in White Plains at One North Broadway Unit 111. AirSculpt is known for its premium body contouring procedures and is a key player in the industry. The company operates under the NASDAQ ticker symbol AIRS.

Market update: BTC's price dips below $95,000, prompting traders to buy. Will it prevent further drop in BTC and altcoins?
news.summary: Investors are taking advantage of Bitcoin's price dropping below $95,000 by purchasing, aiming to curb a potential larger decline in both BTC and alternative cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: H.B. Fuller (NYSE: FUL) to sell Flooring business as part of reorganization to create faster-growing solutions business.
news.summary: St. Paul-based H.B. Fuller Company (NYSE: FUL), known as the largest pureplay adhesives company worldwide, revealed a significant reorganization plan for its building and construction segments. The objective is to establish a more swiftly evolving solutions division, catering to a customer base that complements the architectural and infrastructure markets. As part of this strategy, the company will divest its Flooring business and integrate its Insulated Glass, Woodworking, and Composite segments.

news.headline: PTC Therapeutics partners with Novartis for $3B on Huntington's disease program, including $1B upfront payment.
news.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTCT) has entered into an exclusive global license and collaboration agreement with Novartis AG (NYSE: NVS) for its PTC518 Huntington’s disease program and related molecules. In this deal, PTC is set to receive a sizable upfront payment of $1.0 billion, along with potential future payments of up to $1.9 billion linked to development, regulatory and sales milestones. The agreement also entails a profit share for PTC in the U.S. market and double-digit tiered royalties on sales outside the U.S. Watch out for more details on this development on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stellantis NV's market value halves in 2024, stock down 47% YTD, CEO Tavares exits abruptly. Shares plummet by 7%.
news.summary: Stellantis NV (NYSE: STLA) has faced significant challenges in 2024, with its stock dropping by 47% year to date, leading to a substantial decrease in market value. The unexpected departure of CEO Carlos Tavares, more than a year ahead of his planned retirement in 2026, has heightened uncertainty among investors. The automaker is grappling with declining electric vehicle sales, high inventories, and increased competition from China. Following Tavares’ exit, Stellantis Inc. shares fell by nearly 7%. Tavares, who became CEO in January 2021 after overseeing the merger of France's PSA Group and Italy's Fiat Chrysler Automobiles, was the highest-paid executive in the automotive sector, earning $39 million in 2023. Despite his efforts in cost-cutting and electrification, Stellantis shares have fallen by nearly 20% since the merger. Tavares’ legacy has been a mix of bold initiatives and underperformance in EV sales. The company's struggles raise questions about its future direction without Tavares leading the way.

news.headline: France's administration is facing challenges, with approval ratings dropping to record lows.
Joe Biden pardons son; traders speculate Trump may pardon Jan 6 protestors. 85% chance in first 100 days. Trump criticized Biden's pardons, hinting at support for pardoning rioters.
news.summary: Following the recent pardon of Hunter Biden by President Joe Biden, attention has shifted to potential pardon recipients from President-elect Donald Trump. Speculation has arisen around individuals involved in the January 6th Capitol riot, often dubbed as "J6 hostages" in Trump's discourse. Traders on Polymarket have given an 85% likelihood of these rioters receiving pardons within the first 100 days of Trump's presidency. Trump's public criticism of the justice system and his allusions to potential pardons for these individuals have fueled this speculation. In a post on Truth Social, Trump questioned whether Biden's pardons extended to those imprisoned for their roles in the riot, labeling their continued incarceration as a "miscarriage of justice." These developments shed light on the ongoing discourse regarding potential pardons under the new administration.

news.headline: Brevik carbon capture plant, world's first full-scale facility at a cement plant, reaches mechanical completion in Norway. ACC ASA holds 20%.
news.summary: In Fornebu, Norway, as of December 2, 2024, Aker Carbon Capture ASA (ACC ASA) has achieved a major accomplishment by successfully wrapping up the construction of the world's inaugural full-scale carbon capture facility situated at the Heidelberg Materials Brevik plant in Norway. ACC ASA has a 20% ownership stake in this groundbreaking project, marking a significant step forward in the realm of carbon capture technology.

news.headline: Lathrop GPM opens 8,900 sq ft Boston office on 28th floor of 28 State, following hybrid model.
news.summary: Lathrop GPM LLP has recently relocated its Boston team to a larger office space spanning 8,900 square feet on the 28th Floor of 28 State. This new office follows the hybrid office design scheme seen in the firm's other locations.

news.headline: Willowdale Asset Management officially launches as real estate asset manager, overseeing 7 businesses, with $5 billion in assets.
news.summary: In Vaughan, Ontario, on December 2, 2024, Willowdale Asset Management, previously a part of Empire Communities, has unveiled its debut as a versatile real estate asset manager. The entity is responsible for supervising seven independent enterprises within the sector. Situated in Toronto, Ontario, Willowdale has a historical background tracing back to its establishment in 1993. Originating as a singular-project construction firm, it has evolved into a robust, vertically aligned real estate asset manager. Presently, Willowdale manages a substantial portfolio totaling nearly $5 billion in assets across North America.

news.headline: Empire Continental Land rebrands to Precedent Land Company under Willowdale Asset Management in Vaughan, Ontario as of Dec 02, 2024.
news.summary: Vaughan, Ontario - On December 2, 2024, Empire Continental Land, previously under Empire Communities, has announced its rebranding as Precedent Land Company. The entity now operates independently as part of the newly formed Willowdale Asset Management.

news.headline: After transferring nearly $2 billion in Bitcoin from Silk Road, the US Government caused a dip in price as funds moved to Coinbase.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has dropped after a significant transfer of almost $2 billion worth of confiscated BTC from Silk Road to Coinbase.

news.headline: Veteran Ventures Capital invests in Turion Space, expanding space tech portfolio. Dual-use national security tech focus.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia on December 2, 2024, Veteran Ventures Capital (VVC), a venture capital firm that focuses on investing in dual-use national security technology businesses founded by veteran entrepreneurs and leaders, revealed a significant investment in Turion Space (Turion). This strategic investment underlines VVC's commitment to supporting innovative ventures in the national security sector. Turion, the recipient of this investment, specializes in the development of space technologies and is poised for significant growth due to this partnership.

news.headline: Ethereum attracts $2.2B, surpassing Bitcoin, as fund inflows surge in 2024. Shift in investor sentiment observed - CoinShares.
news.summary: According to fund flow data from CoinShares, there has been a recent change in investor sentiment, with a shift occurring from Bitcoin to Ethereum.

news.headline: Inhabit receives investment from Blackstone & GSV to boost property management tech growth. Blackstone leads equity investment.
news.summary: Property management software solutions provider Inhabit, based in Knoxville, Tennessee, revealed on December 2, 2024, that it secured a preferred equity investment round. The investment was spearheaded by Blackstone Tactical Opportunities and also received funding from Greater Sum Ventures. This significant investment from Blackstone underscores their confidence in Inhabit's growth and potential in the industry. While the exact amount of the investment was not disclosed, the involvement of these major players indicates a noteworthy financial backing for Inhabit.
